arts.ttl: Roy Keane receives assistant manager offer as he gets message from ex-Man Utd star
arts.sum: One of Roy Keane's former Manchester United team-mates has implored the Irishman to make a managerial comeback – and he has even suggested he wants to be his assistant

arts.ttl: Lunch date brings Manchester United exit closer – DoF prepared to fly to England to seal transfer
arts.sum: The final details of Alejandro Garnacho’s move from Manchester United to Napoli are now being worked on. That’s according to Corriere del Mezzogiorno, who report that there is a feeling the Argentine will end up in Naples this month. They report that Manchester United have lowered their demands for Garnacho to €60m. arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford 'behind Liverpool and Newcastle stars' in Barcelona's transfer priority list
arts.sum: Manchester United star Marcus Rashford has been linked with a number of clubs during the January transfer window, but a Barcelona move remains possible if conditions are met

arts.ttl: Manchester United duo in danger of Europa League bans as Bruno Fernandes situation explained
arts.sum: Man United take on Rangers in a big Europa League clash at Old Trafford on Thursday evening.

arts.ttl: Sources: Marcus Rashford sends clear message to Barcelona about his dream scenario before the transfer deadline
arts.sum: TBR Football understands that Marcus Rashford has informed Barcelona that joining them is his preference and he will wait on their offer ahead of anything...

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes names NINE players Manchester United should sell amid Chelsea 'interest' in Alejandro Garnacho
arts.sum: Matthijs de Ligt and Joshua Zirkzee are also on the chopping block

arts.ttl: Manchester United player who just scored twice could leave in January transfer window
arts.sum: Man United youngster Sam Mather travelled on the pre-season tour of the USA and could leave on loan this month.

arts.ttl: €50m bid made: Chelsea weighing up next move after contact with Manchester United
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly weighing up their next move after some initial transfer contact with both Manchester United and their Argentine winger Alejandro Garnacho. The Blues are holding internal talks about potentially making a bid for Garnacho, while Napoli have also made an opening offer of €50million. arts.ttl: 'My manager said I was one of world's greatest talents – Man Utd can sign me for £40m'
arts.sum: Manchester United were interested in Zion Suzuki at the start of Erik ten Hag's reign, but the goalkeeper would now cost significantly more to sign in the January transfer window

arts.ttl: Lecce chief 'delighted' with Man Utd transfer talks as he reveals Patrick Dorgu plan
arts.sum: Manchester United have held talks with Leece as they plot a January move for Patrick Dorgu, but the club's president has made their stance clear as discussions continue
